latest.title: volcano crater not a crater at all
latest.script_key: watch the hole that isn t one that dent isn t a crater it s a collapse where magma drained fast the walls tilt inward because the ground fell in that s why eruptions surprise scientists the ground can drop before the lava even shows you ever seen a hole this big appear overnight tell me in the comments

latest.title: volcanic crater hiding a secret
latest.script_key: this crater hides a green surprise lush forest thrives inside the volcano s rim where ash keeps pests away but rain feeds new life the ring of green you see it s the crater s own survival trick nature s firebreak right here ever notice how volcanoes don t always scream destruction watch this one twice

latest.title: glacier carves mountain valleys in real time
latest.script_key: this is how valleys form watch the glacier scrape rock like a giant rasp it grinds downhill dumping debris in ridges behind that s why peaks keep changing shape you ever seen a mountain cut in half

latest.title: Coral reefs are cities built by tiny animals

latest.title: elephants drink like humans do
latest.script_key: watch their trunks do this see that tip curl under like a straw that s how they suck up 2 gallons at a time without drowning their nostrils act like a built in straw no gulping no choking that s why they can drink while standing in deep water
